description_long: This is a triangular traffic warning sign with a red border and a white interior, featuring a bold black exclamation mark in the center. The sign is mounted on a slender, cylindrical metallic post with rounded end caps at both the top and bottom. The rear of the sign is plain and unmarked, showing a solid gray surface. The post appears to be made of metal, likely steel or aluminum, providing durability and stability. The sign is designed to be highly visible to approaching pedestrians and drivers, with its bright red border and clear symbol. The overall construction is typical for urban roadside warning signs, intended to alert road users to potential hazards or the need for caution.
description: A triangular warning traffic sign with a red border, white background, and a black exclamation mark, mounted on a metallic post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular sign face with a red border and black exclamation mark on a white background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the sign and post, with no visible markings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain gray back of the triangular sign and the post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile of the post and sign.
